title: Zhang Ailing | Chinese Novelist & Essayist | Britannica
author: Britannica Editors
evidence_summary: Metadata-only note: this source supports a high-level biography of Zhang Ailing/Eileen Chang, including her Shanghai upbringing, Hong Kong education interrupted by war, breakthrough in 1943, attention to urban residents and intimate relations, later moves to Hong Kong and the United States, and her late-life retreat into revision and Dream of the Red Chamber study.
notes: Stored as bibliographic and evidence metadata only. No copyrighted body text from Britannica is reproduced in this repository asset.
